name: fpl-skills
description: Flagship workflow plugin for the ForgePlan ecosystem. 33 engineering skills + dev-advisor agent + 5 hooks (+ smith greeting). v1.33.0: smith-bootstrap pre-flight gates — Step 0 Gate A (5 MUST plugins enabled: fpl-skills, agents-pro, agents-sparc, agents-core, forgeplan-workflow) + Gate B (.mcp.json wired with forgeplan block, args: ['serve']). Halt-and-instruct: if any gate fails, print install/wiring commands and exit without writing files. Closes the silent-fallback bug where missing agents-sparc would route Step 6 to agents-pro:artifact-author (generic) and skip SPARC Specification contract, and the missing-`.mcp.json` bug where dispatched agents lose forgeplan MCP surface. v1.31.1: EPIC-002 niceties patch — N1-N4 polish + EVID-099 audit fixes. v1.31.0: EPIC-002 PRD-063/064 — 4 new smith skills + 5 templates + session-start.sh smith greeting + 5 READMEs + AGENT-AUTHORING-GUIDE Profile B-orchestrator. v1.29.0: Sprint Z10 — /methodology-check. v1.28.1: Sprint Z9 — c4-diagram Dispatch mode.
